keyFeatures.zh: 支持多种语言的跨语言支持

description.en: Basic features such as spell checking and basic grammar suggestions are available for free.
description.zh: 免费提供基本功能，如拼写检查和基本的语法建议。

weaknesses.en: Limited to basic features in the free tier
No detailed pricing information for paid tiers
weaknesses.zh: 未提供付费套餐的详细定价信息

positioning.en: WordChecker positions itself as a versatile tool for anyone who needs to check their writing for errors in multiple languages.
positioning.zh: WordChecker 定位为一款多功能工具，适用于需要检查多种语言中错误的任何人。
